title: eriogonum esmeraldense var. toiyabense
intro: Eriogonum esmeraldense var. toiyabense, also known as the Toiyabe buckwheat, is a perennial shrub native to the southwestern United States and northwestern Mexico. This plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties. The health benefits of Eriogonum esmeraldense var. toiyabense include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help to reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and cancer. Eriogonum esmeraldense var. toiyabense can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies for its potential to aid in wound healing and reduce fever.
